caption: A sports stadium scoreboard is displayed against a dark background, showing the start of a football match between two teams. The scoreboard is red and white, featuring the logos of the competing teams and the text "LaLiga Santander." A score of "0-0" is prominently displayed in the center, with "CAJA RURAL GRANADA" and "WINAMAX" logos appearing on the sides. Below the score, a match timer counts the elapsed time. In the first three frames, the timer reads "00:00." In the final frame, the timer advances to "00:01," marking the official start of the game. The bottom left of each frame displays a timestamp of "22:00." Small team crests are also visible at the top of the overall image composition. No people are visible in the frames, which focus exclusively on the electronic scoreboard.
